summary: Independent QA accepts the M7 design-token and asset-slot foundation. The implementation satisfies the task acceptance criteria for centralized UI tokens, map presentation tokens, neutral placeholder-only asset replacement slots, English and zh-CN Storybook evidence, semantic states, debug on/off distinction, and no final production art approval. The diff remains confined to allowed UI, map-renderer, Storybook, test, and process-message/state paths; no sim-core, sim-ai, protocol, save-format, Electron, dependency, content-source, docs gate/status, telemetry, server, cloud, mod, or authority-state scope drift was found. Downstream M7 app shell, map presentation, district inspector, appointment flow, guidance, and UI regression tasks can consume this foundation as presentation-only infrastructure.

acceptance_review.criterion: Design tokens cover colors, spacing, typography, radius, borders, elevation, semantic states, and map-layer states.
acceptance_review.evidence: CLIENT_DESIGN_TOKENS exports the required token groups; MAP_RENDER_TOKENS centralizes map renderer colors, route widths, labels, settlement, district, and canvas fallback values; shell CSS exposes matching M7 CSS variables for downstream web surfaces.

acceptance_review.criterion: Centralized asset replacement slots cover required UI and map asset families.
acceptance_review.evidence: CLIENT_ASSET_REPLACEMENT_SLOTS covers frame, icon, map-fill, map-stroke, route-style, settlement-marker, portrait, alert, settings-language, and tooltip categories with sizing, vector, locale, map-authority, and review-gate metadata.

acceptance_review.criterion: Neutral placeholders are clearly distinct from final production art.
acceptance_review.evidence: All current slots are created through createPlaceholderSlot with status.kind neutral-placeholder; tests assert hasOnlyNeutralPlaceholderAssets and no approved-final-art markup. The approved-final-art type exists only as a future explicit reviewed state and no current slot uses it.

acceptance_review.criterion: No final production art, culture-specific symbols, religious imagery, flags, clothing, architecture, portraits, scripts, or text production assets are approved.
acceptance_review.evidence: No asset files or final-art paths were added. Slot review gates explicitly keep art, culture, historical, and localization review required for future replacement, especially portrait and settlement-marker slots.

acceptance_review.criterion: Storybook or equivalent evidence shows core token states, English and Simplified Chinese layout stress, semantic states, and debug on/off.
acceptance_review.evidence: .storybook/M7DesignTokensAssetSlots.stories.tsx provides Normal, Empty, Error, Extreme, Narrow, SimplifiedChineseLayoutStress, DebugOn, DebugOff, and PlaceholderRegistryOnly stories. Unit tests render EN and zh-CN evidence states and debug on/off.

acceptance_review.criterion: No token, map art, slot, or placeholder becomes authoritative simulation, historical, content, save, command, or state.
acceptance_review.evidence: Diff scope excludes sim-core, sim-ai, protocol, save-format, content-source, Electron, and dependency manifests. Map renderer consumes read-model snapshots plus viewport intent and rebuilds render cache; tests assert no WorldState import/leakage and read-model rebuild behavior.

acceptance_review.criterion: No scope drift into server, cloud save, telemetry, accounts, mods, release, branding, production dependencies, or manual node battle.
acceptance_review.evidence: Forbidden-path scan found no matches; package and lock files are unchanged. E2E test additions assert no final-art approval marker and no telemetry/account/server/mod buttons on relevant surfaces.

acceptance_review.criterion: Downstream M7 UI quality tasks can rely on this foundation.
acceptance_review.evidence: Public @monsoon/ui exports expose token, semantic-state, slot registry, slot helper, stress fixture, and evidence component APIs. @monsoon/map-renderer exports MAP_RENDER_TOKENS without introducing a UI-package dependency.

tests_run.result: Clean worktree on feat/m7-design-tokens-asset-slots tracking origin/feat/m7-design-tokens-asset-slots before QA review.
Task registry command succeeded; M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 is REVIEW.
Ready command succeeded; current ready candidate is M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001.

No forbidden sim-core/protocol/save-format, Node IO, Electron, or direct Pixi package imports matched in the task implementation files; rg exit 1 means no matches.
Prettier format check, ESLint, recursive typecheck, and architecture boundary check passed; self-test fixture produced 15 expected violations.
Clean before writing this QA handoff; after this message, only the QA handoff JSON is expected as a new file.

external_test_evidence_reviewed: Writer handoff records pnpm build:web exit 0 with existing Vite large chunk warnings.
Writer handoff records pnpm storybook:build exit 0 with existing Storybook plugin timing and large chunk warnings.
Writer handoff records pnpm test:e2e --project=chromium exit 0, 15/15 passed.

QA route records lead-verified writer handoff validation, systems handoff validation, task validation, git diff --check, UI/map-renderer tests, web build, Storybook build, pnpm check, and Chromium E2E.

not_rerun_by_qa.reason: Artifact-generating build was not rerun by QA to preserve the instruction that the only write in this lane is the QA handoff JSON; writer and lead route evidence record exit 0.
Artifact-generating Storybook build was not rerun by QA to preserve the instruction that the only write in this lane is the QA handoff JSON; writer and lead route evidence record exit 0.
Chromium E2E was not rerun by QA because Playwright may emit test artifacts; writer and lead route evidence record exit 0 with 15/15 passed.

decisions.decision: Accept the token and slot layer as presentation-only foundation for downstream M7 UI tasks.

No Human Gate is required for this review because no final art, culture-specific production asset, dependency, protocol/save/schema, Electron/security, telemetry/server/cloud/mod, manual-node-battle, or frozen product/platform/core architecture change is introduced.

risks.summary: The existing player shell still has legacy literal CSS and prototype UI text outside this foundation task.
risks.mitigation: Downstream M7 app shell, map presentation, district inspector, appointment, guidance, and regression tasks should migrate touched surfaces to these token/slot APIs and enforce no-debug-text assertions.

risks.summary: This task creates replacement slots but does not approve any production art or culture-specific visual asset.
risks.mitigation: Future approved-final-art slot population must route through art, culture, historical, localization, and QA review before integration.

risks.summary: QA did not rerun Web build, Storybook build, or Chromium E2E to avoid non-handoff writes in a read-only review lane.
risks.mitigation: Lead route and writer handoff already record those commands as passed; rerun them in a write-permitted integration lane if lead wants fresh artifact evidence before merge.

requested_action: Lead orchestrator may proceed with integration/closure gates for M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 and route downstream M7 UI quality tasks to consume this token and asset-slot foundation.
